title: The Great War of the Three Factions
importance: The foundational historical event that shaped the modern political landscape of the supernatural world.
fact: A massive, ancient conflict fought among the Angels, Devils, and Fallen Angels that resulted in catastrophic casualties for all sides. The war ground to a halt after the two Heavenly Dragons, Ddraig and Albion, disrupted the battlefield and forced the factions to inadvertently team up against them.

title: The Evil Pieces System
importance: Allows the Devil race to replenish their numbers by reincarnating humans and other races as Devils.
fact: Created by Ajuka Beelzebub, this system utilizes 16 chess pieces infused with demonic technology to reincarnate other beings into a Devil's peerage. The pieces grant specific trait boosts based on standard chess roles like Rook, Knight, Bishop, Queen, and Pawn.

title: Sacred Gears and Longinus
importance: The primary source of supernatural power for humans, driving much of the series' combat mechanics.
fact: Sacred Gears are unique items implanted into human souls by the God of the Bible to bestow miraculous abilities. The thirteen strongest Sacred Gears are classified as Longinus, possessing power capable of slaying gods or sealing high-tier entities.

title: The Rating Game System
importance: Acts as a non-lethal military substitute and social ladder for Devil nobility to settle political disputes.
fact: Rating Games are competitive tactical simulations that utilize a Devil's peerage in structured combat mirroring a game of chess. They were developed after the Great War to prevent further pure-blood casualties while letting noble houses test their military might.

title: The Fall and Death of God
importance: A closely guarded secret that fundamentally altered the governance of Heaven and the Underworld.
fact: During the climax of the Great War, the God of the Bible perished alongside the four original Maous due to extreme exhaustion and mortal wounds. Heaven managed to hide this fact from the public by utilizing the System to maintain natural laws and human prayers.

title: The Juggernaut Drive
importance: The ultimate, forbidden transformation of the Two Heavenly Dragons' Sacred Gears.
fact: Juggernaut Drive overrides the user's conscious mind by tapping directly into the absolute, historical malice of past hosts to manifest the dragon's true power. Activating this state rapidly consumes the user's lifespan and sanity unless properly countered or mastered.

title: The Three Factions Peace Treaty
importance: Ended thousands of years of hostility and unified the Three Factions into a singular global alliance.
fact: Following a summit disrupted by terrorists in Kuoh Town, the leaders of the Angels, Devils, and Fallen Angels officially signed an unprecedented non-aggression pact. This treaty shifted their focus from inter-faction warfare to mutual survival and containment of rogue organizations.

title: Khaos Brigade and the Faction Splits
importance: Serves as the primary antagonistic alliance pushing the world toward structural instability.
fact: Formed under the nominal leadership of the Infinite Dragon God Ophis, the Khaos Brigade is a syndicate of rogue supernatural radicals from various mythologies. The alliance is split into distinct factions, each executing separate agendas to destabilize global peace.

title: The Red Dragon Emperor's Promotion Rule
importance: Allows Pawn-class characters to temporarily match or exceed the baseline power of higher chess pieces.
fact: Under the mechanics of the Evil Pieces system, a Pawn who enters enemy territory can undergo a Promotion to assume the attributes of a Queen, Rook, Knight, or Bishop. Issei exploits this rule extensively to amplify his draconic parameters mid-battle.

title: The Dragon Gates and Ley Lines
importance: The foundational environmental energy grid that anchors earthly regions like Kyoto.
fact: Ley lines and Dragon Gates are subterranean rivers of immense spiritual energy flowing throughout the Earth's crust, heavily tied to regional Youkai domains. Tampering with or altering these flows can destabilize localized realities or open interdimensional portals.
